review_title: Remote workstation is great with NordLayer
author: Mas Idayu H.
pros: iPhone, Android, Linux, and Macintosh are all supported devices for this VPN, which allowed me to run the same VPN across all of my gadgets and get an excellent connection. Even during a trial version, NordLayer offers the most reliable IP address selection from various countries.
cons: Currently, the only details accessible are a detailed description of the remote device's CPU and RAM and its connection time. Counting the time spent on a machine or in a group over a given period is problematic. Last week, it was impossible to identify whose computers had been accessed.

review_title: Fantastically easy to use but support not always helpful with backend issues
description: With all staff suddenly working remotely, we needed a secure option that allowed a dedicated gateway for remote staff to use. NordLayer allowed us to configure 50 staff easily and without any major disruption to business thanks to useful team admin interface and ease of setup/installation via the Windows and Linux client.
author: Fred L.
pros: The online user interface and the software interface itself are easy enough for all staff to navigate, in particular admin can restrict settings within the app to ensure correct use and reduce tickets from staff having issues connecting.
cons: Downtime on our dedicated UK Gateway has been frequent enough that we had to provision a backup server located in France which we end up using several times a month. Support not always helpful and tend to refer to basic troubleshooting when clearly a server issue.

review_title: Good VPN but lacking features and customisation
author: Lawrence C.
pros: User interface is very simple and straightforward. Easy to install and deploy. Team management is also easy.
cons: Having used NordVPN, it seems it has less features. Customer support is very unhelpful. When trying to use other protocols, they don't always work.

review_title: Useful and secured VPN - used for security in a banking software environment
description: Easy to setup, easy to deploy, easy to manage, and secured.
author: Benoît B.
pros: Easy to setup, easy to manage access for teams and members.The dedicated VPN server with static IP address.New members joining the team are activated with only a few actions and are ready to work within a few minutes.The security is really important to us, and we rely on NordLayer to access protected IT resources securly.We also appreciate the availability on multiple devices (smartphone, Windows, Mac OS...)
cons: Sometimes, the network fails to establish connection and we need to reboot the computer to get network back - mainly after application updates.But it seems that since latest versions we don't encounter this issue as much as we did.

review_title: Doesn't get in the way of your day today work
description: Excellent. Easy to setup. Easily forgotten once connected. I never think; will I be able to do my work today? Will I be able to complete my work before the VPN provider kicks me off my dedicated IP? I haven't needed to contact support. As far as I know, we've only had a handful of issues connecting which were solved by a local (home) router reboot.
author: Chris H.
pros: We as a team love that NordLayer doesn't get in the way of our work. Previous VPN providers we used were constantly causing issues. Once connected to NordLayer's VPN, you forget that you are connected. This is, in our opinion exactly what a VPN should do.
cons: The software delivers on everything we need. There's nothing to complain about.

review_title: Great solution for site to site connections
description: It's mostly great. The channel account manager has been helpful, was able to connect me to the right people in support to get me up and running.
author: Joel D.
pros: The ability to connect the VPN in a router in order to connect a device to their VPN that otherwise wouldn't support VPN on its own. Their desktop clients are easy enough to use, even on Linux (which is entirely done in the terminal using the command line interface).
cons: Hard to use without a static IP. I intend on getting a static IP later, but for now I have been holding off. Every time my public IP changes, I need to get level 2 support to update the VPN server to connect to the new IP. They say they'll have a feature in the portal some time next year allowing me as the admin to update it myself, but I'll probably have a static IP by then.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best security tool on the market
description: I have it on every work computer that I use for it to work and protect all of the software that I use.
author: Andy M.
pros: Very good and usefull tool for every network security needs. It's a very reliable software that i cannot recommend enough
cons: I don't have any specific negative aspects to say about the software. It's a very good tool for everyday security

review_title: Best way to keep a safe connection at work
author: Rebeca C.
pros: NordLayer is the perfect way to keep a safe connection, specially while handling private data from patients, wherever I'm at.
cons: Sometimes it logs off automatically, which requires a new connection to make sure I'm able to keep a safe connection while I work.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great and reliable VPN service
author: Florian S.
pros: I mostly like the ease of use and the pro features like having company gateways with dedicated IPs in different locations worldwide.
cons: I have to re-login from time to time on my devices. But I'm not sure if this is something NordLayer is responsible for or the OS.

review_title: NordVPN for Protection
author: Deborah S.
pros: I am a personal user of NordVPN. Although my home router provides security, I wanted an additional layer of security for myself and my family. This allows me to feel safer, particularly when we use our smartphones outside of our home Internet connection.
cons: It's annoying to keep having to connect each time and there is a bit of a slowdown in data on smartphone, but it's a "con" that I will live with in order to have the security I want.

review_title: Gutes Produkt, aber unzuverlässige Preisgestaltung
description: Wir haben einen Mehrjahresvertrag mit einem vereinbarten Rabatt pro Lizenz abgeschlossen. Als wir Monate später weitere Lizenzen hinzufügen wollten, weigerte sich Nord Security, den vereinbarten Preis zu gewähren. Für uns ist das ein Vertrauensbruch, nicht nur eine Kostenfrage. Als schnell wachsendes Unternehmen erwarten wir von Anbietern eine verlässliche Partnerschaft.
author: Lion L.
pros: Die Produkte selbst (NordPass/NordLayer) sind technisch solide und funktionieren gut. Von der Nutzerseite her erfüllt es alles, was wir brauchten.
cons: Die Preisgestaltung ist intransparent und unzuverlässig für wachsende Teams. Rabatte gelten nur für den Erstkauf, und Lizenzen werden bei Erweiterung unerwartet teurer. Selbst schriftliche Angebote werden mit der Begründung "abgelaufen" nicht eingehalten, obwohl sie die Grundlage für einen laufenden Vertrag sind.

review_title: NordLayer Review
description: It is positive because it offers a secure and practical way to manage remote access for teams. It is especially useful for organizations that want stronger network security, easier user control, and a more manageable alternative to traditional VPN setups.
author: Rakhi V.
pros: Its strong security features combined with a simple user experience. It provides secure remote access, identity-based controls, and centralized management without feeling overly complicated for everyday use.
cons: Troubleshooting connection or access issues can sometimes take extra time, especially when policies, gateways, or user permissions are involved. The experience can also feel a bit limited when deeper customization is needed.

review_title: Good VPN connection
description: I have been using it for a year and It's very good, it provides a reliable VPN connection. The interface is very user friendly too.
author: Sally G.
pros: It's very simple to use and provides a stable and reliable VPN connection. I really like that it doesn't lower your normal Internet speed at all like other apps do.
cons: When you use it for the first time and haven't logged it yet, by default it is on "always on VPN" which means it disables your Internet until it's connected to the VPN. It does have the option to disable it, however, it's a little hard to see, so if you don't know about it, you will be without Internet connection and not realizing why.

review_title: Nord Layers is great for our business needs.
description: This has been really useful for allowing our international workers to easily connect to and user services inside the US, since many websites and services block international connections. Since this is our major use, our experience has been mostly great. Occasionally it appears that the IP our employees our using seems to get blocked by some sites, so they have to disconnect and reconnect a few times to try and get onto the site.
author: Alex V.
pros: This allows us to easily manage VPN connections for remote employees without having to run a dedicated VPN service in our office. This keeps our bandwidth needs in office lower. It’s also super easy to manage our users using this software. Very customizable, with us being able to add dedicated IPs as needed.
cons: We had a unique situation where we wanted to connect some of our multimedia devices to this service (Firestick, Apple TV), but we were unable to because no app was available to connect these. I know a NordVPN app exists on these devices, but it would be nice if a NordLayer one did as well. Or, if we could sign into NordLayer through the NordVPN app.Also, I can’t seem to find a way to request the app cycle your IP to another address. We have had issues where websites we connect to seem to have blocked the IP address currently used.

review_title: NordLayer VPN
description: Overall, the experience has been good. Could be improved with more fine-grain settings that provide more control which is needed in an enterprise environment.
author: Brian M.
pros: NordLayer integration is fairly easy. The App is straightforward and easy to use on both computer and phone. Seamless login with Azure AD SSO.
cons: More control over how the admin settings apply to users could be improved. For example, I may want a subset of users to see only the dedicated VPN Gateway and have another group of users able to see all country gateways. Some settings are all or nothing and it would be better to be able to have more control. Having to download the MSI package for an RSS feed is a little wonky. It would be an improvement to be able to easily preconfigure settings and have a custom-built MSI for mass deployment in an enterprise environment. For example to be able to set the Protocol to IKEv2 instead of Automatic. Have had issues with Automatic Protocol since it pretty much defaults to NordLynx which doesn't seem as stable. Most issues we come across are resolved by switching the protocol off Automatic (NordLynx) to IKEv2. Lastly, it would be nice if setting the Automatic update setting would just automatically update the app instead of notifying the user that an update is available. Users without admin rights on the machine can't perform the update and are continually prompted that there is an update.

review_title: Affordable VPN for remote needs
description: Enabling Remote Workers to access work resources that are not typically available in their country has been incredible. Our alternative was a cloud based private VPN solution that was going to cost $6k to deploy and hundreds per month in operational fees. NordLayer does it for less than $100 a month.
author: Taylor M.
pros: The ease of use for both the admin configuration and the end user setup portion. Inviting new users is easy and teaching them how to connect to the VPN is quick. The network quality is also impressive. Our primary use is for our VoIP system, and there are no latency issues compared to local workers.
cons: I don't have any cons. NordLayer has met all of our needs and I have never needed support, the product has just worked as advertised.

review_title: Fast VPN, Mac App need some improvement
description: It has been good and done the job for our company. The service is extremely fast and works all around the world (which has been tested by our staff).
author: Raymond P.
pros: Super fast VPN, we are able to host and stream with no issues and very little delay. Straight forward user panel and very friendly support.
cons: The Mac App though the Appstore has caused me some issues in my MDM environment. The start with computer start features turns off sometimes and it is recommended to add the programs manually to the start up program on System Preferences. Also is there a way to link the app and the device so it will not sign out on occasion. Dropbox app has a way of doing this, and it remains signed in, even if your Mac Keychain is reset (in the case I user gets locked out of Mac and needs to use recovery / FileVault keys to gain access).

review_title: Samsung SEAD review
description: Daily usage for remote work and access to restricted servers from home. All admins and agents working with the Nord Layer are very happy
author: Mario D.
pros: Ease of setup, how easy it is to obtain a static IP address in a country that we needed. Very easy for all users to use the software. Great customer support that replies in a short time and answers the questions.
cons: Nothing to note, we didn't find anything so far that we don't like.

review_title: The best VPN I've used and recommended
description: NordLayer is the best VPN I've used so far especially when I started working remotely. As the Admin Lead of our organization and the EA to our CEO, security is our topmost priority so the peace of mind that this software provides us is the number one selling factor, followed by its competitive price point.
author: Kate L.
pros: Ease of installment and deployment and adding team members
cons: Failure to connect to the internet when VPN is on -- does not happen as frequent though and is usually resolved by restarting the application

review_title: Nice Product
description: Really good opinion about the product. We use the VPN every day, easy use and Multiplatform. We need to dig more about the other options like Remote Desktop etc. But for the moment we will continue using NordLayer because is a product that fit perfect with our daily business.
author: Jaime G.
pros: We made an extensive search looking for products like this. Finally this was the selected one, because it fit perfectly with our needs, and besides is really easy to use, Multiplatform and nice price.
cons: Sometimes we have some issues depending on the computer and we need to modify the settings on the app. Minor issue.We need to dig about more possibilities like the Remote Desktop, now only made a heavy use of the VPN.

review_title: Easy to Buy, Easy to Use
description: This allowed us to get a VPN up and running quickly to provide secure access to our systems during the pandemic.
author: Sean R.
pros: The ease of setup allows you to get a VPN up and running for your company within minutes. Getting a gateway means you'll have a static IP for all of your VPN users, making it easy to poke holes in your firewall/add IPs to your cloud allowlists to get your users connected to your assets securely.
cons: The app requires updates constantly, which is annoying to end users and tech support. A third party app is required to manage updates silently.

review_title: The best VPN so far
description: I am overwhelmed by this VPN. Highly recommended.
author: Abhishek J.
pros: It is very easy to access the vpn with NordLayer tool. VPN gateways can be changed within a second.
cons: There are so many updates and sometimes it it slow.

review_title: The Best VPN for remote work
description: Our employees connect to our overseas clients that have requirements to have the IP coming from the client's region
author: Leonardo Jr C.
pros: Easily manage user access and a breeze to setup
cons: No negative experiences as of the moment.

review_title: Le meilleur VPN
description: Assez satisfaite de l'utilisation du NordLayer. Je le trouve entre les autres VPN que j'ai utilisé le meilleur
author: Alexandra A.
pros: Je l'utilise depuis plusieurs années pour me connecter quand je suis en voyage ou depuis un réseau pas sécurisé
cons: Un peu difficile pour installation et pas beaucoup des pays pour se connecter

review_title: Implement a company wide VPN easily and inexpensively, with great support
author: Ned S.
pros: NordLayer makes it easy to implement a company VPN and secure company communications and traffic at a reasonable price. Great customer support makes it even easier.
cons: Monitoring reporting is very limited, requiring the use of other tools if that’s important to your organization.
